title: vimen × russeliana
intro: Vimen × russeliana, also known as the hybrid of Vimen and Russelliana, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Vimen × russeliana include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Vimen × russeliana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and ease digestive issues.
